allowed_claims: The low/normal-VIX control pack can be parsed locally.

Claims remain capped at E1 diagnostic evidence.
conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้

diagnostic_decision.allowed_next_action: Pre-register a separate bounded exact-replay diagnostic for the normal/control candidate dates only before computing candidate-trade PnL or making any E2 claim.
